title: astragalus humifusus
intro: Astragalus humifusus is a perennial plant species in the legume family, commonly known as a type of milk vetch or bean. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus humifusus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving overall well-being, making it a popular supplement among those seeking natural remedies. In herbal preparations, Astragalus humifusus is often used in combination with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and is typically available in capsule, tablet, or tea form.
